properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 112/15
1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 25 1830 NOV 15.
NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N. EAST OF 5W.

71-32.0N - 030-10.0E     TRANSOCEAN ARCTIC
71-16.7N - 022-16.7E     SCARABEO 8
66-04.6N - 008-14.9E     DEEPSEA BERGEN
 
NOTES: A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 110/15
